top3.sql:
WITH stack_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.name,
        ms.version,
        ms.step,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model = 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) AS stack_score,
        MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model != 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) AS max_non_stack_score
    FROM model_score ms
    GROUP BY ms.name, ms.version, ms.step
),
status_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        ss.name,
        ss.version,
        ss.step,
        CASE 
            WHEN ss.stack_score > ss.max_non_stack_score THEN 'strong'
    ...

WITH strong_soft_status AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.name,
        ms.version,
        CASE 
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model != 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) < MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model = 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) THEN 'strong'
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model != 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) = MAX(CASE WHEN ms.model = 'Stack' THEN ms.test_score END) THEN 'soft'
        END AS status
    FROM model_score ms
    GROUP BY ms.name, ms.version
),
